title: disporum calcaratum
intro: Disporum calcaratum, also known as the calcareous-disporum or mountain pleurisy root, is a type of flowering plant native to China, with its stems and roots being used in traditional medicine. The plant contains various bioactive compounds, including alkaloids and saponins, which are believed to possess medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Disporum calcaratum include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the roots and stems of the plant are often dried, then used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
